documentation.description:
| Purpose
| Contents_Page adds lines to the table of contents and
| prints the table of contents.  Once the table of contents
| has been printed, no more lines may be added to it.
|
| Initialization Exceptions (none)
| Notes (none)
|
| Modifications
| 08/16/89  Rick Conn    Initial Version

subprograms.name: Add_Line
subprograms.code:
procedure Add_Line
  (Level : in NATURAL; Line : in STRING; Page_Number : in STRING)

subprograms.name: Print
subprograms.code:
procedure Print
  (Target : in Formatted_Output_File.File; Spaces_Per_Level : in NATURAL)
